audit_items.proof_trace: Graph resources allocated by q6apm_graph_open() (line 257) are not freed on error paths after line 257. Error cleanup only calls kfree(prtd) but missing required q6apm_graph_close(prtd->graph) as done in normal cleanup.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers PCM constraint failures after q6apm_graph_open succeeds, causing repeated graph resource leaks leading to memory exhaustion.
